Bring water to a rolling boil in a medium stock pot
Rinse the quina with cool water in a fine mesh strainer to remove excess starch
Add quinoa to the boiling water and cook for ~10-12 minutes, or until at desired tenderness
Strain through fine mesh strainer and reserve to a sheet tray to cool, placed in blast chiller.
Once cooled, fry in deep fryer at ~350°F, using a fine mesh strainer to remove once puffed.
Product should be fully fried and puffed, with no moisture or chewiness left
Dry on sheet trays with reseting racks lined with sport towels.
Reserve into quart containers
